---
name: Counterexample
about: Submit a counterexample that challenges the framework
title: "[Counterexample] "
labels: counterexample
assignees: ""
---

## Claim being challenged

Quote or summarize the claim.

## Counterexample

Describe the case, event, system, or argument that challenges it.

## Why it matters

Explain whether this weakens, narrows, or falsifies the claim.

## Possible repair

If the framework can absorb the counterexample, suggest how.

## Sources

Add links, references, or context when available.
